name: Ralph Northam
subject: What's at stake if we don't protect our Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EbAMoU-iTYUtw56XInDrOZraQO9goyecx_avLMf81Yc=/2y3HZtZ-qg7XUzP9I2s7ILDeqlEd08mlCMzgEAnAayE=)
---
Friend, Our first deadline of the year is tonight at midnight. The Republicans will do everything in their power to turn back the clock on the progress we've made if we fail to protect our Democratic Majority this November. Here are just a few of our accomplishments that will be under attack if we don't have the resources to turn out our voters this November:
* Enacting commonsense gun safety measures
* Repealing medically-unnecessary restrictions on women's access to reproductive healthcare
* Providing sweeping anti-discrimination protections for LGBTQ Virginians
* Becoming the third state in the nation to pass a ban on "no knock" warrants
* Becoming the first state in the South to abolish death penalty

**[Please chip in before our quarterly fundraising deadline so we can protect our Blue Majority and keep the progress going!](https://act.myngp.com/el/EbAMoU-iTYUtw56XInDrOZraQO9goyecx_avLMf81Yc=/tDmmMU9bSrho4FIcHaUQLvBgqXkLfZtmQ8QXXi7Zntc=)** We hold a majority by the slimmest of margins so it is of utmost importance that we hit our first quarter fundraising goal. name: Brianna Mast
subject: Please, will you help me?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
You may have heard of my husband Brian Mast. He currently serves as a Republican Congressman from Florida where he has been fighting to keep our communities safe. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c900%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=b46Sc5ao%2bVnViNv1mGGYBQ&sysid=1)
You may have heard of my husband Brian Mast. He currently serves as a Republican Congressman from Florida where he has been fighting to keep our communities safe.
|
---
| | Friend,

You may have heard of my husband Brian Mast. He currently serves as a Republican Congressman from Florida where he has been fighting to keep our communities safe and ensure the best possible future for our children.

What you might not know is that Brian was deployed to Afghanistan when our first child was just 4 months old. When Brian was blown up, I feared the worst: that our beautiful little boy was going to go through life never knowing his father.

By the grace of God, though, Brian survived. He lost two legs and a finger, learned to walk again on prosthetics and has been the most amazing father I can imagine for our (now four) little munchkins.
---
| [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1632%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Yf%2f2pIjaKRacJVdU8m1hmg&sysid=1)
---
| I was by Brian’s side during the long and exhausting days of his recovery. I saw in him a drive and passion to not let his best service to our nation be behind him.

Now, in Congress, Brian works just as hard to protect our country from those who want to do us harm.

But because Brian always puts America First, he’s a target of those in power.

CNN’s Jake Tapper even tried to silence him by questioning his commitment to our democracy -- after Brian lost two legs and finger fighting for Jake’s freedom of speech!

As a result, I’m told that fundraising this quarter has been even more difficult than usual. Campaigns cost millions of dollars to run, and if Brian is going to have the resources necessary to overcome conservative censorship and cancel culture, he needs our help now.

That’s why I told Brian I would [help him raise $10,000](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1633%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7EQ%2bhbbTS8sPBr4uXJtQhg&sysid=1) toward his end of quarter fundraising goal. I’m hoping you’ll help me with a contribution of [$15](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1634%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YTCc3Rhst2zbSNizEy17LQ&sysid=1), [$35](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1645%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Mykj5dWs1XO6doM1yhszw&sysid=1), [$50](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1646%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hUL%2fz4nKYix8KGJdWcGPog&sysid=1), [$100](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1647%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1B1fRGN%2bVPXC0%2bfCRtu3OQ&sysid=1), or any amount you can afford.

I don’t want to let Brian down, and your support would be a huge help for Brian to help him set up a winning campaign.
---
| [Send Brian Your Support](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1648%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f16vi%2fJPLvAjuPHUazq%2f%2fA&sysid=1 "Send Brian Your
Support")
---
| Brian loves his job, and he is proud of his mission to serve the American people. He’s always been there for us, even sacrificing two legs and a finger, so I hope you will consider being there for him now.

Brian and I will be proud to have you on our team, and I will be so grateful when your support arrives!

Sincerely,
Brianna Mast

---
| | | PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
---
|
---
| Mast for Congress | MastForCongress.com
PO Box 3016, Stuart, FL 34995
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c900%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=b46Sc5ao%2bVnViNv1mGGYBQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c900%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=b46Sc5ao%2bVnViNv1mGGYBQ&sysid=1)

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
The TNDP is as strong as it’s ever been. Our staff is laser focused and there is an energy and excitement that’s hard to put into words. We are instigating changes and programs to bring the TNDP into the future, and right now we need your help. When I came on as Chairman, it was because I thought there was a path to a Blue Tennessee. Now I know there is. We just need to put in the work – and right now that means meeting our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.
We are just $1,280 away, and with your support I know we can make it across the finish line. Will you help? We have until midnight. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus

Mark is planning to go big in 2022 to support Democratic Senate candidates through his political action committee Forward Together. He has set an ambitious goal of raising $7,000 by the end-of-quarter deadline to help support Democrats in key races around the country.

**[We're asking you to keep the Senate blue by donating to Mark's Forward Together PAC. body:
I still need your help to keep Indiana RED! Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470370?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a691c8def4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

I just wanted to send you a quick update on our critical end-of-quarter fundraising drive. We’re getting so close to finishing our quarter strong and we need all the resources available to keep our Republican winning streaking going in Indiana!

Democrats have made Indiana one of their top targets for 2022, and they’re already raising record amounts to try and bring a blue wave to the heartland!

**If everyone reading this chips in just $5, we will CRUSH our goal and have the foundation to keep Indiana RED in 2022 and beyond. Will you please help?**
---
| [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=03e226bbcd&e=1acd9bb3d6 "CHIP IN $5 >>")
---
| I know I don’t need to remind you of the damage that Joe Biden and the rest of the Democrats have already done. It is imperative that we hold strong here in Indiana, and begin the work of winning back Washington DC.

[Please help keep Indiana RED by chipping in just $5 before midnight TONIGHT! >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2e692af924&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Thanks,
Kyle Hupfer, Chairman IN GOP

We’re getting so close to finishing our quarter strong and we need all the resources available to keep our Republican winning streaking going in Indiana! Democrats have made Indiana one of their top targets for 2022, and they’re already raising record amounts to try and bring a blue wave to the heartland! If everyone reading this chips in just $5, we will CRUSH our goal and have the foundation to keep Indiana RED in 2022 and beyond. name: Greater Georgia
subject: MYTH VS. FACT: GREATER GEORGIA SETS THE RECORD STRAIGHT ABOUT ELECTION INTEGRITY ACT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, MARCH 31, 2021
MYTH VS. FACT: GREATER GEORGIA SETS THE RECORD STRAIGHT ABOUT ELECTION INTEGRITY ACT
ATLANTA - Last week, the Georgia General Assembly passed the [Election Integrity Act](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wehCMIb_GWd9RpTjOS8kDUhk7KlI5yKiD5Iq50glknX8dvJfxMX79C6EcCNl7aEU2G_0o8rf_mdJo-dRPcChPD8ns4fmsA-_d1DRAF6D5RTxl7WTkXn7SfvfNJCEKdUpWALoSaYznX5_meTM6o8Su-YnOm-2fGcQO7T_XS6uO7g=&c=2CsBN-jWSF-kS-E89VsOaAj9l1fZM3H67GKaA_aOeRUE8XqVMTj1Uw==&ch=J6MSpKnMAlqS7h_48E6K6ae4ypJXGnW2mJL6ApK3jONxfL7sDSJpSg==), which Governor Brian Kemp immediately [signed into law](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wehCMIb_GWd9RpTjOS8kDUhk7KlI5yKiD5Iq50glknX8dvJfxMX79Asuft2MkFUVD9uFhSQqUmoH7f5K5IYbnaGDcZ-rZt3mHI2C3UKq_lqoPNyh0gu2DsX_hBRhboAWsDhAxrcWa81AaLaojhBUbq3y4un2h9r7P4ilxDJ6GDu9WeFOZHRcrTd10zTn08Kxr2r6jecDeQomESPBD6bxoPKkH1HYdUpa6gSe0FTqinI=&c=2CsBN-jWSF-kS-E89VsOaAj9l1fZM3H67GKaA_aOeRUE8XqVMTj1Uw==&ch=J6MSpKnMAlqS7h_48E6K6ae4ypJXGnW2mJL6ApK3jONxfL7sDSJpSg==). Instantly, liberal groups and many in the mainstream media began perpetuating a [disinformation](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wehCMIb_GWd9RpTjOS8kDUhk7KlI5yKiD5Iq50glknX8dvJfxMX79CRmErGHee6wmhbLlm9XFIWbOGPckoqQwZ2UVX_p9XbA0DHBmoExjyG3_jqiI_ywb6ntX0oXLiWXVcMaSANIUztfbQrv4nOtJQmBjehy1QFl5fpSUU9JCODlQGVNc02L3DDIBRepYxforkPRmSZKTPGJsRuY6McbBTf312zwSBZxU_Cc7dDc3TFAKM3rLg3w9ZVc48FK3_Ejluo9Nzi2wVXnXmFcbTHOQmiyMTqide2PztY2BemY5AfuMurmjMYMgAMcV9ttj6dym1Sl9Y1vWPA=&c=2CsBN-jWSF-kS-E89VsOaAj9l1fZM3H67GKaA_aOeRUE8XqVMTj1Uw==&ch=J6MSpKnMAlqS7h_48E6K6ae4ypJXGnW2mJL6ApK3jONxfL7sDSJpSg==) campaign, [claiming](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wehCMIb_GWd9RpTjOS8kDUhk7KlI5yKiD5Iq50glknX8dvJfxMX79CRmErGHee6wnBWIpHgKnmakUlNupE9y2pQTeIo1XjzlQTU2jkX-V7wlNOO7HqsMheJ0vJAfU6lPDen5EyOpk_q1eogi3qKLH8-wUj7Jnoze5BSZOFKUOcRFLoHdq5QL6KyyuzvmEGBEvZsxjZS5mgpXnMJPb7ob08d2Ol8B3Uuc9PC5WeWsPqBd3mmdHxJ2dx-KIMFFJrP5N7TLAw3j3Ikf7PPUeA4uVg==&c=2CsBN-jWSF-kS-E89VsOaAj9l1fZM3H67GKaA_aOeRUE8XqVMTj1Uw==&ch=J6MSpKnMAlqS7h_48E6K6ae4ypJXGnW2mJL6ApK3jONxfL7sDSJpSg==) Georgians were committing "voter suppression" for simply securing and strengthening our elections process. In fact, the new law actually [expands](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wehCMIb_GWd9RpTjOS8kDUhk7KlI5yKiD5Iq50glknX8dvJfxMX79CRmErGHee6wVPU8mMrcVHPRnjEfBZcXRUlrLP340LbExK6j7M-2IHMHbwnztWRMRJYZG21QxS6d00LQKBf42v0-Ios6R-Gpvbhp9OB2pVRCQQwqIy8j6VhEV8lWCn71Em6bPdWBos0Euz9UvWNXkxbGZwWo_Dz8kDPVGPrkcx4ZpNmunCmAiNdSqz_RHnGPCA==&c=2CsBN-jWSF-kS-E89VsOaAj9l1fZM3H67GKaA_aOeRUE8XqVMTj1Uw==&ch=J6MSpKnMAlqS7h_48E6K6ae4ypJXGnW2mJL6ApK3jONxfL7sDSJpSg==) voting access while restoring voter confidence in the system.
Greater Georgia created a graphic to help combat the [false claims](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wehCMIb_GWd9RpTjOS8kDUhk7KlI5yKiD5Iq50glknX8dvJfxMX79CRmErGHee6w9BXDwT1UaK4HFedn6H3hnWO-ZlgZu_Aa5dLqWOvIBvbicS8M7gLGz3g2RWbgjZIyUIUOPDj3qsVHlxHVTGvoqOdzePOMItXrdVf131zqmYdJhz6kGz6wlKJXPs6FVhBPoaISIpDNnDDSa8cG94HsHw==&c=2CsBN-jWSF-kS-E89VsOaAj9l1fZM3H67GKaA_aOeRUE8XqVMTj1Uw==&ch=J6MSpKnMAlqS7h_48E6K6ae4ypJXGnW2mJL6ApK3jONxfL7sDSJpSg==) and set the record straight about what the Election Integrity Act actually does. We encourage everyone to read and share the graphic below to spread the truth about Georgia elections and the Election Integrity Act. Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wehCMIb_GWd9RpTjOS8kDUhk7KlI5yKiD5Iq50glknX8dvJfxMX79CRmErGHee6whmQQsawlRv7EGCjWVEeTtf62G-zjTr31BGQ530JiPbDmD9qmk3tFBDZrYnP0YXyhDgPwVGIyKngIMlnxkvIVt_22M7QiYNvZlPPscJm5ddcznI1nadvQcXPJfifxi5jSk1L_QYyp20uHpR0LxLXPGuKSRxjZQ_orYphmCXnOldw=&c=2CsBN-jWSF-kS-E89VsOaAj9l1fZM3H67GKaA_aOeRUE8XqVMTj1Uw==&ch=J6MSpKnMAlqS7h_48E6K6ae4ypJXGnW2mJL6ApK3jONxfL7sDSJpSg==) or the image below to download:

body:
Every person who joins Team Erica brings us one step closer to making these dreams a reality, so I need your help to bring as many folks on-board as we can.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/rIT8zj4lhP1wAWgPCi0E_JmCV-xCmJ3o82fvxjvkE84=/Q1Y5Q2uvIo_i50TfTjCi_A4m4jDHrc6UcQvUFIYV4wQ=?refcode=em20210331-1)
It's Erica -- do you have a second?
I'm reaching out because today is the last day of the quarter, which means **it 's the last day you can support our campaign before we have to file our first-ever public fundraising report.**
[**_We have just _hours_ left to reach our $22,000 fundraising goal. We want to show everyone the strength of our moral movement, so will you chip in whatever you can spare before midnight tonight?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rIT8zj4lhP1wAWgPCi0E_JmCV-xCmJ3o82fvxjvkE84=/Q1Y5Q2uvIo_i50TfTjCi_A4m4jDHrc6UcQvUFIYV4wQ=?refcode=em20210331-1)

---
Hitting this goal won't just help us report strong numbers -- it will also help us spread the word and grow Team Erica during the next phase of this campaign.
I'm running for Senate because I want to build a government that works for all of us, not just the wealthy and well-connected.
I'm running for Senate to unite a diverse coalition of working North Carolinians behind a bold, progressive platform for progress.
**But I can 't do any of that alone, which is why I'm so thankful to have this team behind me**. Every person who joins Team Erica brings us one step closer to making these dreams a reality, so I need your help to bring as many folks on-board as we can.
[**_Reaching this goal before midnight will go a long way toward doing that. So, if you can spare it, please give whatever you can before time runs out._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rIT8zj4lhP1wAWgPCi0E_JmCV-xCmJ3o82fvxjvkE84=/Q1Y5Q2uvIo_i50TfTjCi_A4m4jDHrc6UcQvUFIYV4wQ=?refcode=em20210331-1)
Thank you so much,
Erica Smith

The challenges facing our nation are great. But our opportunities and potential are even greater – our brightest days are yet to come.

Yours in the fight,
Tracey Mann

**URGENT MESSAGE FROM HOUSE REPUBLICANS:**

Patriot,

We've been trying to get ahold of you because we heard you are a true believer in the Conservative mission. We heard you care about putting America First, just like us.

We're worried because House Republicans are getting outraised by the Democrats right now. It's serious. Just last month, Democrats raised a record-breaking _**$11.5 million**_ to expand their liberal majority in the House and keep Nancy Pelosi in power.

[**We are still $8,461 SHORT of this goal.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HTWQBRQlwi-r86pqz3la27FsM1VUgmP2BD15bk9HnYQo01XVtNFacEZRSKw6igp7I6rogbYVg7kfmhJnEDafDDn9CBHRzJ5jC3HSc9J3VV181oSAdcwQKH0ilYGKAOv1IwwINwW88T6bKOVP1se9S-gh7PFsVmkD0Fx-MoDyRiB7pkei1da7XpG6LMLz0WSNzThQPeMXsuU05CCPCH6o-6Zu29nPRauLfDcbE5nHVU_ujAX5LeIehL3ND1YZmAx_tQm4atbCaTi7IealQa0ygXBR9qF0BrSzfbPEvljHs8-clP1LAc01VyOjdLE_EGcq6BYsoDZntoKuSU0d1x8FXsyD043LgU-ZVGy_MfblQmUCVdELjF8I6hvNWuGc9ICSlV7FAOECFoDsNiCNebIB1ZuOrqpcssJd&c=b11B8kpKqf6nSJGJ9P9jiElAYLRMUB0tinmGdQESzitT1SIEjZj2ZA==&ch=tdqk5B2vngJqsE_VdKf7Nkrl0Yw-1HotGPadeh9m9405MvubcdzMXA==)

name: Friends of Judge Lori A. Dumas
subject: Early Voting has started!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/] Be heard. Vote.
Early voting for the Pennsylvania Primaries has started!
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP22/1/89382/images/Headshot%20%282%29.JPG]
Hi Friend,
Let’s continue the momentum that we started in November 2020 when 40% of all democrats voted by mail, saving time and making their voices heard!
With almost 20 years of quality experience on the bench and in the community, Judge Dumas is more than qualified for the position.
Help Judge Dumas today by registering to vote in the primaries and getting your vote in early. Not sure how to do that? Here’s the breakdown: The primary election is May 18th, 2021.
1) First, you must register to vote in Pennsylvania. Do it in 2 quick minutes right here. [https://www.votespa.com/Voting-in-PA/Pages/Pennsylvania-Voter-Election-Security-Information.aspx]
Monday, May 3rd is the last date to register to vote, so don’t wait until the last minute!
2) Decide if you want to go in person to vote early or mail your ballot in. If you’re mailing it in, request it easily online right here [https://www.votespa.com/Voting-in-PA/Pages/Pennsylvania-Voter-Election-Security-Information.aspx#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin] . If you’re going to go in person to vote, find your polling station. The deadline to request a mail-in ballot is Tuesday, May 11th.
3) Whether voting by mail or in-person, make sure you follow all ballot instructions and properly seal and sign the ballot. Turn it in by mail, bring it to your county’s local election office, or bring it to your designated drop-off location. Completed ballots are due by Tuesday, May 18th at 8 pm EST.
Let's show our support and exercise our voting right! Help Judge Dumas today by registering to vote in the primaries and getting your vote in early.
Vote [https://www.judgedumas2021.com/vote]

https://www.facebook.com/JudgeDumas [https://www.facebook.com/JudgeDumas] https://twitter.com/JudgeDumas [https://twitter.com/JudgeDumas] https://www.instagram.com/judgedumas/ [https://www.instagram.com/judgedumas/] https://www.judgedumas2021.com/ [https://www.judgedumas2021.com/]

Paid for and authorized by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court.
Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
PO Box 40606
Philadelphia, PA 19107
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f2a92199-ce91-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992/2c752445-4292-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzc1MjQ0NS00MjkyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jSG-blmsJjbxoyHGBeZAGF-XpDXzYlI6tRGG-9bdZUw=&id=102043324 .

Amidst the craziness that is DC right now, we do have some superstars.... _patriots who fight for America First and aren't giving in to the Dems' extremism and the media's intimidation. _

**_We will support patriots like Lauren Boebert of Colorado, Marjorie Taylor Greene of Georgia, Bob Good of Virginia, and others like the Freedom Caucus and those loyal to God and America First!_**

These leaders are consistent, conservative heroes who fight for us. THAT is something that Drain the DC Swamp PAC can get behind!

Part of my job is to hold congress critters accountable by letting them know in no uncertain terms that you & I have RED LINES of political death that must NEVER be crossed: no gun grabbing, no history destroying, no LGTBQ special rights, no men dressed as women in the military!”

We have a big deadline tomorrow, March 31st. [Your $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more will is crucial toward supporting an America First majority](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=164b7d221a&e=ba6e67b849)!

name: Team NVAF
subject: Let's be honest...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Victory Action Fund
body:
We've studied the competition. Pelosi and Schumer are terrified of losing their Majorities, and outside groups are already pouring in money to target seats that the GOP can't afford to lose.
**[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mjl826NVHjbaZ-4ks_qiSzYdv7uR8B_jd-CVYcu4GWiIl7W2x3VJqPDtaDDOBOmQ95nFrKMuA6JGmHb0CJOsH4juPy4wgBHt8SEKFnaJHbLTP7xlaLmAWzRjMCXmwv-sBAPmjDl1TKkTgS9LogK05VTr-L420uikrae7daMsuaZqPPvTWzFj7v2Nganip181PuAvP6H82llac94W5ACuS44n1OzAPnJHEyIrFRkF93QpyMuJtI5p4J_RYbK5lQMFgkHWS3PWJoUhIR3l9gPXEhG4HW2yKw03nY2emZZA_RJOQGVCwW_wbquZqt_sTO_VISXIgImYinoQ6_3IX1ohRI3ik1fRX9kjqKCOf2pZbL1ZRWAw9iH9VQAHA0JZPibZDb6L_4W7DzB1eLBNlD9b03gTWUyY-5iNuTeZKMQndn5eZoZhJ_slhYdUdBc-qWWo&c=w7sVccIcf36raoOKbXJMWFWvd8IJl6-PnPv-ZbpxdL-WS7igESdUFg==&ch=5DQwzn9mRKTcaB0h0_NQdalT_sxpYZTU-ZRXzgblg_mLjyxQcxBoCg==)**
Let's be honest, Friend...

In 2020, Republicans were outmaneuvered and outraised up and down the ballot. To defeat the Left's fundraising machine, conservatives need to rethink our strategy in 2022. We have a plan the Left won't see coming.

**We 're ready to fundamentally rethink how campaigns are run** by directly fundraising for candidates' campaigns because we believe they know how to spend their resources better than anyone else. Friend,

name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: We Don’t Have Time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57083614:6nB4wzuNL:m:1:3206719985:CFF0587B4CB520F618CF84BA1D2F7CE0:r "Headline") Peter: Just when I thought that the Squad couldn't go any lower, they surprise me. The latest: When asked about opposition to the completely unconstitutional push to make DC the 51st state, and home to 2 U.S. Senators that are to the LEFT OF BERNIE SANDERS, **Rashida Tlaib compared opposing this measure to slavery.** You read that right - standing up for the Constitution is now the same thing as slavery. If you or I said this, we would be cancelled - Rashida will never be held accountable _unless you and I do it ourselves. We can start by reporting a HUGE number on our first FEC Report of 2021 and letting them know that America has had enough._ **[If we are going to stand up to the radical left, then I need to make sure you are standing with me before the end of this quarter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57083614:6nB4wzuNL:m:1:3206719985:CFF0587B4CB520F618CF84BA1D2F7CE0:r "If
we are going to stand up to the radical left, then I need to make sure you are standing with me before the end of this quarter.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57083614:6nB4wzuNL:m:1:3206719985:CFF0587B4CB520F618CF84BA1D2F7CE0:r "Deadline") | | [DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57083614:6nB4wzuNL:m:1:3206719985:CFF0587B4CB520F618CF84BA1D2F7CE0:r "DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE")
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57083614:6nB4wzuNL:m:1:3206719985:CFF0587B4CB520F618CF84BA1D2F7CE0:r "Rush")My name is James Golden, but you may know me as Mr. Snerdley, call screener and producer for radio legend Rush Limbaugh. I worked for Rush for almost 30 years, and I learned a lot sitting beside a great man like him every day.
I started the New Journey to make Black America Conservative Again. Because of the support of conservatives like you, a record number of Black Americans voted Republican in 2020, **and our work exposing the left for the racists they are is only getting started.**
* They sit behind armed guards and defund the police, leaving Black neighborhoods completely unprotected.
* They bring out grifters like Al Sharpton to talk to us about getting rid of the filibuster - Black America knows the real Al Sharpton, and he is a joke - but he has black skin so they think we will listen.
* Now they have the Squad calling us "racists" and claim we're in favor of "slavery" for supporting the filibuster and opposing DC Statehood.

The madness needs to end, and we can't wait any longer. The New Journey PAC is fighting back, and we badly need your help. **[Please make an emergency donation before March 31 st at Midnight so we can keep fighting.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57083614:6nB4wzuNL:m:1:3206719985:CFF0587B4CB520F618CF84BA1D2F7CE0:r "Please make an
emergency donation before March 31st at Midnight so we can keep fighting.")**
For a New Journey,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57083614:6nB4wzuNL:m:1:3206719985:CFF0587B4CB520F618CF84BA1D2F7CE0:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC
| [DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57083614:6nB4wzuNL:m:1:3206719985:CFF0587B4CB520F618CF84BA1D2F7CE0:r "DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE")

body:
#

Hi — just reaching out one last time before the end of the month. My team just informed me that we’re still about $15,000 short of meeting our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.
I would be so grateful if you could make a contribution -- of any amount -- before midnight tonight. Here’s a link you can use:
**[secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-march-2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27017058/278770898/1108841609?refcode2=9c5d2717-4f92-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&refcode=em210331-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzVkMjcxNy00ZjkyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iSmt7cAlnYTS2PNRQEqO7AZQBoLJ1A5oyO_oKSfDvfU=)**
Thank you again for your ongoing support. It is the honor of my life to serve in Congress -- and I wouldn’t be there without this movement fighting alongside me.
Onward,

name: Tate Reeves
subject: Administration's transgender policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor
body:
Dear Fellow "Neanderthal" — [](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=b40f5da7c3e34c9cb66b108a3d54a6d9&_e=a5Hd57EByN4N9EEYtz_jjYgUD-9DTtp70LgcvFm-40lrgU6mr3V8XccBagfVV-bCCIJSzRJDbl02Qhxc2kothwO1MNqi0MF3xtbREvoPv_O3ePo63mgQ3RfzStwsOYs-u035fd_-6pDOsDrVxkiVHJPaNqi1wCwgZie8WIvSMqKTbch-hB39q3xNeqAzkF2XL5gVKQOR1shyq0GpHWNHlvlnC4LwgBXKQ6px0hqdQe9msgoIp9p28iBHHjT1-SI9fj84iunbHZcIHDiT6F-De8nSM-h-MNtYNJfMv_wXI2BE5FrYOHLFFLwptv31X556dx1AsnDMOgm3LU8rTRQACQ8LwCeIb_b6RTcOLk3YuEg%3D) | |
---
Dear Fellow “Neanderthal” —

As you’ve probably heard, on **DAY ONE** of the Biden administration’s rule by Executive Order, President Biden signed an Executive Order allowing biological boys to participate in girls’ sports in elementary, middle, and high schools all over America.

But we are not going to let the left-wing federal government confuse the very basic understanding of science. And we are **NOT** going to be taking sports scholarships away from high school girls and giving them to biological males. _We want a level playing field! It’s something that we have been fighting for in this nation for hundreds of years._

Giving away young women’s opportunities in sports to biological men is regressive — **_THAT’S the neanderthal thinking._** This administration is taking our country backward – yet President Biden likes to call me, and you, neanderthals.

_**Enough is enough! **_

**Help me tell the White House that we don’t need Joe Biden to interfere in women's sports.**
[_**DONATE HERE**_](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=b40f5da7c3e34c9cb66b108a3d54a6d9&_e=a5Hd57EByN4N9EEYtz_jjZIKzw3u3mhpqpdfYyp-3XhpDn8PJ94f2eQGeW1Q_f-xRb5cNhP2lSZ38Ka_Ju4PWiWhWRI8tEwWoFzkcLklHDI7OH-sRx4p81PGTwtH4pFjSPAWk37EGw21lmzQDdl7-PB-sFm-O4MwX-Mh-yGzA6T9IqYyqhRyC8aeZOi0bomfZvFNpZCNNiUMoKLYc3lIi3qcXYJrBM5SiILoH5j-oS7xnkq67WM62_a6bpqu_hMSZHBYeapXkcbdgkosMe73CbapQqzs4LM3wOp4WU9LxliWLnBMX1EaEiFEF2HjOM_v18MjrRAd-JhiAGJiTkHphVR62oFOZoJS5qH-EmLq68TTd1VTrF3iCXvp9mh4IlrSUMfNVvLMgnp_LyWI0BM0X6ODCb93opGyO-5XWWkt_9o%3D)
We will protect the rights of our young girls and ensure them a fair shot in school sports in Mississippi. _They should not be forced to compete against biological boys who one day decide they are girls!_

This is why I signed the Mississippi Fairness Act, which requires any school in our state to designate its athletic or sports teams according to biological sex. It’s basic fairness – and it’s the right thing to do.
[_**Stand Up for Mississippians Against Big Government Joe! >>>**_](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=b40f5da7c3e34c9cb66b108a3d54a6d9&_e=a5Hd57EByN4N9EEYtz_jjZIKzw3u3mhpqpdfYyp-3XhpDn8PJ94f2eQGeW1Q_f-xRb5cNhP2lSZ38Ka_Ju4PWiWhWRI8tEwWoFzkcLklHDI7OH-sRx4p81PGTwtH4pFjSPAWk37EGw21lmzQDdl7-PB-sFm-O4MwX-Mh-yGzA6T9IqYyqhRyC8aeZOi0bomfWRnBjb4QKtdkNVu9gC5VbKQ8lmGwgcU5axhNH6z40diJ0WzByII4uGIez6F5P0VQ2xmNjzlQcmZ1o0DM-aR3HG_ToOiGYnyTH3qNuNOsee8DZta7ny0fHcC_48AgZ2EcT7_b17mHPzYz5Zybtwz9WlRWQiink8dHcHoGQ_-aXDjPh8db-5U9cHmPFLdo3o8noxvwgCBYSQKCI2g7Hqjr3Whe8o1XRAmZEir45PZVIBg%3D)
**We will continue to protect young girls from being forced to compete with biological males for athletic opportunities.** It’s crazy we even have to address it, but Big Government Joe’s Executive Order forced the issue. The push for kids to adopt transgenderism before they hit puberty is __just_ _plain_ _wrong_._

Mississippi principals and coaches were put in an awkward position by the White House – but we have cleared things up with our new law in Mississippi. I’m sure Joe Biden and his left-wing crowd will attack me for this – but I will stand tall for what’s right.

**Please consider giving what you can today so my team can send this message to Joe Biden ahead of the 2021 First Quarter Fundraising Deadline _TONIGHT_!**

You can donate at the link below.
[_**DONATE HERE**_](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=b40f5da7c3e34c9cb66b108a3d54a6d9&_e=a5Hd57EByN4N9EEYtz_jjZIKzw3u3mhpqpdfYyp-3XhpDn8PJ94f2eQGeW1Q_f-xRb5cNhP2lSZ38Ka_Ju4PWiWhWRI8tEwWoFzkcLklHDI7OH-sRx4p81PGTwtH4pFjSPAWk37EGw21lmzQDdl7-PB-sFm-O4MwX-Mh-yGzA6T9IqYyqhRyC8aeZOi0bomfDdCv5SJR-fCqfZjrSPA8Hjr_--krkKJ86YekszAjp0Bf_2M3j47qttNzkjQt5gUWjqR6leQpYoo89jM_8w7O-NEcQ4LJC2-Vu6LzLXeLPHsec4YfacLI1TRtSnrA2com_flbAdS6PP8SnqzlF51v5QdgFrHCbisha3IYpyAv76xMHwv84r-Oh5dMHa_72LZuWf7xuTQbDjYeIn1A69f5j6uFixomctRLz8_2ztjG5DY%3D)

Thank you,

Governor Tate Reeves

|

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. subject: Activated: 5X Matching for Tim Scott
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE**
body:
%%First Name%%, I have activated 5X matching from now until midnight for any conservative who donates to support Senator Tim Scott. Will you take advantage of this offer and help defend Scott's seat for Republicans?
Friend,

Democrats in Washington are proceeding with their left-wing agenda at a record pace that makes the Obama years look like child's play. From a wasteful $1.9 trillion spending bill to new assaults on 2nd Amendment rights to a naked power play by making DC a state and taking over our state election rules, their progressive agenda poses a serious threat to America's future.

But the 2022 midterm elections are fast approaching, giving conservative Republicans a chance to save the country before Democrats muck it up any further.

To prevail we must support dynamic conservative leaders in tough races. Senator Tim Scott comes to mind. He faces an historic Democrat push to flip South Carolina blue and defeat him to solidify their liberal Senate Majority.

Friend, I've activated 5X matching from now until midnight for any conservative who donates to support Senator Tim Scott. The 2022 elections will be here before you know it. This is our shot to stop the Democratic agenda. Let's not waste it. name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura=20Loomer?=
subject: BREAKING NEWS Regarding Laura Loomer!
body:
Did you hear the latest that Big-Tech did to retaliate against US Congressional Candidate Laura Loomer while she was helping out on Desantis' bill? | | | **They are trying to stop us from Saving America!**
---
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot,

_**I want you to be the first to hear**_ what just happened to me and also know how much your support means to me. On Monday March 29, 2021, I was once again speaking in Tallahassee, Florida regarding Governor DeSantis' proposed FL legislation to hold Big-Tech accountable for censoring Floridians and candidates.

BIG TECH WAS WATCHING
---
| Literally **_minutes_** after I voiced my concerns about loopholes in the legislation, arguing that it should also include penalties for payment processors and banks that discriminate against conservatives and ban them, I was informed via email that Stripe, a payment processor that I was using to process donations, and the same payment processor that is used by the RNC and NRCC through their fundraising platform WinRed, _**BANNED ME as a US Congressional Candidate**_ for **NO** legitimate reason.

**If you recall, Stripe also recently banned President Donald Trump, yet for some unknown reason, the Republican Party has continued to use Stripe. This is unacceptable.**

To help people understand this better, imagine out of the blue VISA or Mastercard decided that you could no longer use them simply because of your political views. Imagine the turmoil that would cause you, your livelihood, or your business!

This was done to me intentionally to damage my candidacy and business, and I believe it was strategically timed as a form of **_immediate retaliation_** because I exercised my 1st amendment rights again, at the Florida State Capitol yesterday in front of numerous Florida lawmakers and grassroots activists, and I demanded Big Tech, including Stripe, be held accountable and not be permitted to interfere in our elections! To top it off, Stripe banned me as a Jewish American Republican candidate during Passover.

We are making great progress towards hitting our campaign's first quarter fundraising goal, and I know Big Tech would love nothing more than to watch us fail. **_Before_** they try to shut my voice down completely as a candidate, **I really need your[generous support](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=4c5c9cf90c&e=4d7c0901a7)! **Let Big Tech know we won’t allow them to pick and choose election winners and losers! Can I count on you to contribute [$25](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=543b40945a&e=4d7c0901a7), [$50](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=8c44025391&e=4d7c0901a7), [$100](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=bfa290bf77&e=4d7c0901a7), or a max donation of [$2,900](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=714a280e76&e=4d7c0901a7) today to help my campaign hit our first quarter goal?
---
| [ ](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=a66b2ccd32&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
| **LET’S SAVE AMERICA TOGETHER AND BREAK UP BIG TECH!**
---
| Thank you so much for your support!

Truthfully
---
|
---
| | Laura Loomer
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 www.Loomer2022.com, All rights reserved._

Laura Loomer for Congress, Inc.
720 Lucerne Ave #1465
Lake Worth, FL 33460

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=2d7902377a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=2d7902377a).
---

body:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a3/2a380d31/26d686ed/f07d25/1646010530/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a3/2a380d31/26d686ed/f07d25/1646010530/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi,
We're bumping the Senator's note because it's true: every dollar in this race makes a difference.
She only won her last race by 1,017 votes and now, she's Republicans' number one target.
Tonight's FEC deadline is the first big test of our campaign's momentum, and the Senator is counting on your help (yes yours, you reading this!) to get us over the finish line.
[**Please donate $3 or more to keep New Hampshire blue, protect the Senate majority, and defend critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan and the Affordable Care Act.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a3/2a380d31/26d686ed/f07d26/1646010530/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMV9lb3EyLWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210331_eoq2-k_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you for helping!
_\----------Original Message----------_
Hello,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to contribute to my campaign. But first, I'd like to take a minute to explain why your support is so crucial in this race.
From day one, we knew it would be a tough fight to keep this seat. I only won my last race by 1,017 votes -- a fraction of a percent. Now, Democrats have a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate, and you can bet that Mitch McConnell is doing whatever it takes to get the GOP back in power.
Tomorrow's FEC deadline is the first big test of our campaign's momentum. **I 'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to get us over the finish line. [If you can, please chip in $3 or more to keep New Hampshire blue, protect our Senate majority, and defend our progress.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a3/2a380d31/26d686ed/f07d26/1646010530/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMV9lb3EyLWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210331_eoq2-k_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
I got into public service to take on tough fights and get results for the people of New Hampshire. I was proud to cast crucial votes in the Senate to save the Affordable Care Act and pass the American Rescue Plan. But now, I'm the Republicans' number one target.
In a race as close as ours in a state as purple as New Hampshire, every dollar makes a tremendous difference -- and it could be the deciding factor between holding on to this vulnerable seat or losing it to Republicans. [**That 's why I'm humbly asking you today to support my campaign by chipping in $3 or more right now.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a3/2a380d31/26d686ed/f07d26/1646010530/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMV9lb3EyLWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210331_eoq2-k_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a3/2a380d31/26d686ed/f07d27/1646010530/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMV9lb3EyLWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210331_eoq2-k_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a3/2a380d31/26d686ed/f07d20/1646010530/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMV9lb3EyLWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRaUI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210331_eoq2-k_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a3/2a380d31/26d686ed/f07d21/1646010530/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMV9lb3EyLWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVReUI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210331_eoq2-k_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a3/2a380d31/26d686ed/f07d26/1646010530/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMV9lb3EyLWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210331_eoq2-k_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Giffords.org
subject: Our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2021 comes to an end at midnight
body:
#

Friends,
We're reaching out today because we need your help. This month, we've been working tirelessly to urge Congress to pass universal background checks.
Our work began with the House, which acted quickly to save lives. Now, the bill sits with the Senate which is moving slower than we'd like to pass this lifesaving legislation. We want to give them a push to act quickly, but we need the resources to be effective.
And that's where you come in. Our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2021 is coming to a close tonight at midnight, and we still need some last minute support to hit our 25,000 contribution goal.
So we have two options: we either need a lot more donations or for supporters giving their first donation to give just a bit more than we normally ask for.
Normally, most first time contributors chip in $5. If you would consider contributing $10 we'll be in a great position to urge the Senate to pass this lifesaving bill.
[**So what do you say? Can you make a $10 donation to Giffords PAC before midnight? We 'll take that contribution and put it right to work passing the lifesaving bipartisan background checks bill that will be voted on in the Senate.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee165/78fba3aa/62965c77/50aad9e4/1138363008/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210331-1-full")
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee165/78fba3aa/62965c77/50aad9e4/1138363008/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210331-1-full")**
There is a lot of political division in this country right now, but on this issue the American people of all party affiliations -- Democrats, Independents and Republicans -- are united: we want change that will make our communities safer from gun violence.
Thank you for being a part of this movement with us.
All our best,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee165/78fba3aa/62965c77/50aad9e4/1138363008/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210331-1-full")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee165/78fba3aa/62965c77/50aad9e7/1138363008/VEsC/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

body:
only a few hours are left to send Democrats a clear message | |
---
| | [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=a5a143afd5&e=0b94e583bc)

| |
This is it! Our first **_End of Quarter_** fundraising deadline is at **_midnight._**

[**If you haven’t given already, will you pitch in $50 — or even just $20.22 — right now? **](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=e6d3342888&e=0b94e583bc)

Over the last two months, we’ve seen how far Democrats will go to transform America.

They’ve kept schools closed but our borders open. They’re trying to rip away the Constitutional rights of law-abiding gun owners. _Now, they’re talking about “vaccine passports” for Americans to travel within America._

And on top of all of that, they’re trying to ram H.R. 1 — an assault on our democracy — through the Senate. **_It would send your tax dollars to political campaigns you disagree with, including Elizabeth Warren’s!_**

this is unhinged stuff. **Democrats are on a mission to change America into a single-party, socialist state — and we’re the last line of defense.**

[**Will you stand with me and my team now? Every donation makes a difference in the fight to take back our country.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=3da4251fd6&e=0b94e583bc)

Democrats have liberal Hollywood donors, big corporations, and their enablers in Big Tech and the media.

**I have conservatives like YOU** — _and I’m personally asking you to show them that we won’t be outworked, and that we’re united to take our country back._

[**Please, click here to chip in $50, or even just $20.22, before it’s too late.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=a538bfe7c5&e=0b94e583bc)

Senator Roger Marshall

name: Chuck Rocha
subject: Antoinette Sedillo López
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nuestro PAC
body:
We need elected officials who understand how vital the Latino community is to the future of our country.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27022670/278792989/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3MzEwNDhiLTYwOTItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sRyHz7vi5Rxa3SCBGWA7LY0mZL4bHqIQ4_N7d-O8gSk=)

Friends -
We need elected officials who understand how vital the Latino community is to the future of our country.
That’s why Nuestro PAC is proud to endorse Antoinette Sedillo López for the 1st Congressional District of New Mexico.
Antoinette has dedicated her life to advancing justice, equity, and stewardship for her community and state through activism, education, law, and community engagement.
**[Can you make a donation of whatever you can afford right now to help power Antoinette to victory and grow Latino representation in Congress?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27022671/278792990/1999088365?refcode=210331-nm1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3MzEwNDhiLTYwOTItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sRyHz7vi5Rxa3SCBGWA7LY0mZL4bHqIQ4_N7d-O8gSk=)**
Antoinette has always been drawn to helping others. As a law professor at UNM for 25 years, a leader to protect victims of domestic violence, and a State Senator, she has fought for everyday New Mexicans every step of the way and that won’t stop in Washington, D.C.
As a supporter of progressive policies like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and free college and university tuition for all, Antoinette is the leader New Mexico needs to enact bold change.
Antoinette has not let us down, so let’s not let her down.
Chip in today to help get her across the finish line strong!

clean_body: We need elected officials who understand how vital the Latino community is to the future of our country. = Friends - We need elected officials who understand how vital the Latino community is to the future of our country. That’s why Nuestro PAC is proud to endorse Antoinette Sedillo López for the 1st Congressional District of New Mexico. Antoinette has dedicated her life to advancing justice, equity, and stewardship for her community and state through activism, education, law, and community engagement. = Antoinette has always been drawn to helping others. As a law professor at UNM for 25 years, a leader to protect victims of domestic violence, and a State Senator, she has fought for everyday New Mexicans every step of the way and that won’t stop in Washington, D.C. As a supporter of progressive policies like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and free college and university tuition for all, Antoinette is the leader New Mexico needs to enact bold change. Antoinette has not let us down, so let’s not let her down. Chip in today to help get her across the finish line strong! Sincerely, Chuck ****=** Paid for by Nuestro PAC . An end to the 2nd Amendment._

These are just a few of the destructive policies that will be pushed on Virginians if Democrats get their way in this governor's race. If you want to fight back against them, then we need your help to meet our end-of-quarter deadline at **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.** [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MwOfzL4kFRMeGV_uccAV86nxSqDj3DFkjU-x1AWATfjBGzzjtSfnpQGgPqZHQBk6wOJqO8l9vKWpfEdmB0Lg9YX-YV-eOCvlMF1rajI8qi_Yv0kZjU7qvFpqiz0kN2dwcdTm3TQvZL9fme-Mj6tuAf-RMqYQWLYJJaxpLgeCuOg4qPMB3wVnizO5HrrClo1zSZ7ICNq57JQQZGxkcMZu4jJO_e1ZytjDIKSUHA1ZhRVmNUX4TgQw99dIRX__ePzwjpS2B-vz6y_RPh-E4m6c2JcYa-y8GUclsfLjGR8PsBYdmP84WDW2rqD2_ASRjMjwFJk0V5AyY47ALguRPTZHfPUS_lGLr_Rc94FnUYBSD_Uz4WxSJjz8_zi-db9Ql_wTQmKNZLLv135ENbCJte6KG_eXNWszDyCM&c=Dm7zVg6hRm8LHVgUqJ_xQ0Ub1PazfUsrLmw8z2XAiSiK1LIRob0bvg==&ch=3mk14XVBiyiNXOwM3FBwWnEx9DrwHxwLRJ7oZCgsGrqsWhKwgaVq7w==) Friend, we only have a few hours left until the deadline, and we're still SHORT of our goal. name: Latinos for America First
subject: Latinos for America First Call to ACTION April 1st
body:
CALL TO ACTION * * * March 31, 2021: Latinos for America First Legislative Priorities Action Alerts Election Integrity Action Alert: Thursday Morn
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=317403.1956.1.e4e3e53130ac36fdc75ceb8cb7d2ee51) |
---
**CALL TO ACTION**
* * *
---
|
---
March 31, 2021: Latinos for America First
Legislative Priorities Action Alerts
**Election Integrity Action Alert: Thursday Morning, April 1st**
He’s baaaack! Robert Frances ‘Beto’ O’Rourke is supposed to testify in opposition to Chairman Cain’s HB 6 election bill Thursday morning, along with a bunch of his Democrat friends. They are even running cable commercial ads to try to stop our election safeguards from being passed ....
Are we going to allow them to overpower us? Not a chance! See below for things you can do to stand FOR election integrity.
PLEASE make sure you submit a public comment if you can’t make it to the Capitol! The committee must attach these comments to the minutes of the committee hearing and the other side is out working us. It only takes a moment!
*Texas House Committee Electronic Public Comment Portal: https://comments.house.texas.gov/home (Reminder, you are only able to submit comments for these House committee hearings until the hearing is adjourned.)
Watch House Committee hearings live here: https://house.texas.gov/video-audio/
The SREC Legislative Priorities Committee has approved the committee substitute for HB6 as aligning with the RPT Election Integrity Priority.
HB6 contains the increased penalties for election law violations that we have advocated for along with clear checks and balances for clear paths to prosecution.
**Talking points and sample script for HB6 can be found HERE.**
**Electronic Public Comment Portal:** https://comments.house.texas.gov/home?cmid=36038ef6-845b-472a-a9f9-c355c4f2d184
_*_ ACTION ITEM 1– Contact your likeminded friends, family members, & neighbors. Ask them to submit public testimony through this portal Thursday morning after 8 a.m. but before the House Election Committee adjourns.
_*_ ACTION ITEM 2– Email and call Chairman Cain to request he bring this bill up for a vote in committee on April 1st along with contacting the House Election Committee members to let them know you support this bill and to vote it favorably out of committee.
**Election Committee members:** https://capitol.texas.gov/Committees/MembershipCmte.aspx?LegSess=87R&CmteCode=C240
_*_ ACTION ITEM 3– If you can make it to Austin, the Election Committee hearing is on April 1st, 2021 at meeting at 8:00 a.m. in E2.028. (Tips: what to do before and after you get there!)
House Election Committee Hearing Notice for Thursday, April 1st, 2021 in E2.028 at 8:00 a.m.: HERE
Texas residents who wish to electronically submit comments related specifically to the House Election Committee agenda items without testifying in person can do so until the hearing is adjourned by visiting: https://comments.house.texas.gov/home?c=c240
WE NEED TEXANS TO CALL TOMORROW OR FILL OUT THE PUBLIC COMMENTS VIA THE LINK ABOVE TO MAKE YOUR VOICES HEARD!!!
PLEASE LIST LATINOS FOR AMERICA FIRST AS THE ORGANIZATION YOU ARE REPRESENTING especially because the LEFT is saying that House Bill 6 suppresses the minority vote.
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=317403.1957.1.564d2384b0ae1794e6c6b4a4c3256733 "Facebook") [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=317403.1958.1.738f43f401ddf17353006a1b96dd9ab5 "Instagram") [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=317403.1959.1.adf629ea07a7f70eba85d1c07611aa8d "Twitter")

Friend,

**Nancy Pelosi just said she has the right to overturn our election win. I think it’s time we tell her the American People are the only ones with the right to decide our election.**

We have until midnight tonight before our first public fundraising deadline of the year. Peter,

This year continues to be a hard and challenging year for everyone. The good news is that the Democrats finally hold the White House and Congress and we have taken steps to help crush the coronavirus and rebuild our economy.

Under the Biden Administration, we are slowly beginning to return to normal life, and have the opportunity to make real and positive change across our nation. But this will take time, and we only have a slim majority in the Senate. We must work together if we are going to hold the majority.

I’m focused on helping out my fellow Democrats so we can hold onto our majority — it’s the only way we’ll pass the policies that Americans deserve.

name: Latinos for America First
subject: SCOTT PRESLER COMING TO RIO GRANDE VALLEY
body:
Scott Presler Coming To McAllen, TX! (McAllen, TX) – ‘Latinos For America First’ is excited to announce Scott Presler as our featured speaker on Apri
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=318801.1968.1.601eaee709fab39604767f8518b80f23) |
---
Scott Presler Coming To McAllen, TX! (McAllen, TX) – ‘Latinos For America First’ is excited to announce Scott Presler as our featured speaker on April 12, 2021 from 6:00-8:30pm at Old Beer House in McAllen, TX. Scott’s training will focus on election integrity, instructing poll watchers and candidate recruitment during this premiere event. More information on this free event can be found at www.latinotrumpcoalition.org . Scott Presler Coming To Harlingen, TX! (Harlingen, TX) – ‘Latinos For America First’ is excited to announce Scott Presler as our featured speaker on April 13, 2021 from 6:00-8:30pm at City Church Harlingen in Harlingen, TX. Scott’s training will focus on election integrity, instructing poll watchers and candidate recruitment during this premiere event. More information on this free event can be found at www.latinotrumpcoalition.org . Scott Presler is a world-renowned conservative activist and heavyweight social media influencer. Recipient of the 2021 CPAC Ronald Reagan Award, Presler has dedicated the past four years traveling the country to teach like-minded Conservatives voter registration and has successfully trained 100,000+ volunteers nationwide how to effectively advocate for traditional Republican values- all at no cost. Scott adds, “I’m coming to McAllen because there’s a crisis at the border and it is clear that the Biden Administration is not making our safety a priority. This visit is also about reaching out to the Hispanic community- which is voting Republican in historic numbers. It’s no secret why Representative Filemon Vela is retiring. We’re laser-focused on flipping TX-34 from blue to red!” Moreover, “Latinos For America First” is also hosting a special event to benefit the Border Patrol on April 14, 2021 and invites you to Upcoming Events | Latinos for Trump (latinotrumpcoalition.org) for more information.
---
| | [ RSVP Now ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=318801.1969.1.97a5e34e0b314ee92b5d8773c2675187)
---
| |
---
---
---
Can't wait to SEE YOU in the Rio Grande Valley Latinos for America First

name: Roger Misso
subject: Remember November? Winning starts NOW.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at [Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsU5NIhypChE-WcIt6c81s0Q1_c3131O9sgaeit1pQs=/n99j_qPbNrRw0-8RCB05OemZ1E5RcslbUYAZOdJzeXE=), our mission is to elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress. Last year, we elected TWELVE outstanding endorsees - including Senators like Raphael Warnock and Mark Kelly and Representatives like Deb Haaland (now Secretary of the Interior!), Mikie Sherrill, and Elissa Slotkin.

Winning campaigns for the U.S. House and Senate doesn't just happen overnight, though. It takes time. And we are already investing that time - [and financial resources](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsU5NIhypChE-WcIt6c81s0Q1_c3131O9sgaeit1pQs=/GSx70wyKC_fs4i6aUGcJTyzZlQtGT_5K3c-opDoWtGM=) \- in making sure veterans and military family members are successful at the ballot box in November.

Last month, we led all national veterans groups in announcing our RPG Strategy for 2022:

Right now, we are in Phase One: [_**Recruit** veteran and military family candidates of integrity to run for office in competitive seats._](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsU5NIhypChE-WcIt6c81s0Q1_c3131O9sgaeit1pQs=/GSx70wyKC_fs4i6aUGcJTyzZlQtGT_5K3c-opDoWtGM=)
Next, we will focus on Phase Two: [_**Persuade** veteran and military family voters in five key states with competitive U.S. Senate elections._](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsU5NIhypChE-WcIt6c81s0Q1_c3131O9sgaeit1pQs=/GSx70wyKC_fs4i6aUGcJTyzZlQtGT_5K3c-opDoWtGM=)
Finally, we will go to Phase Three: [_**GOTV!** Get out the veteran and military family vote across the country._](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsU5NIhypChE-WcIt6c81s0Q1_c3131O9sgaeit1pQs=/GSx70wyKC_fs4i6aUGcJTyzZlQtGT_5K3c-opDoWtGM=)

Our goal in 2022 is to **double** the number of veterans and military family members in Congress - and to **win at least five** U.S. Senate seats!

_**That 's why we need you. **_[_**This is the last day of our quarterly fundraising deadline. Everyone who donates before midnight will have their donation matched 400%! Can you help us? Click here to chip in now!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsU5NIhypChE-WcIt6c81s0Q1_c3131O9sgaeit1pQs=/GSx70wyKC_fs4i6aUGcJTyzZlQtGT_5K3c-opDoWtGM=)

Remember November. That's our mantra at Taking the Hill. Thank you for helping us WIN November _[by chipping in TODAY!](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsU5NIhypChE-WcIt6c81s0Q1_c3131O9sgaeit1pQs=/GSx70wyKC_fs4i6aUGcJTyzZlQtGT_5K3c-opDoWtGM=)_

In solidarity,

The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
+
TEAM TAKING THE HILL

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsU5NIhypChE-WcIt6c81s0Q1_c3131O9sgaeit1pQs=/NAJ4RLSNCtq4BKhkin1zlCyA-uaqfz2YVDVD4r8rm0g=).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zephyr=20Teachout?=
subject: The Anti-monopoly Man
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Peter,

[**A hard-core anti-monopolist is running to represent Missouri in the United States Senate.**](https://lucaskunce.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94b1071915c3a2a77d91a5fd9&id=48e1aca059&e=4a867a2c4b)
His race couldn't be more important. Missouri has an open Senate seat for the first time in years. Democrats' Senate majority is razor-thin. Electing my friend Lucas Kunce would flip a Senate seat blue that was decided by less than three points in 2016.
Lucas Kunce is a friend of mine. I've known him for a few years. He's a total public servant: energetic, warm, and madly in love with this country in the best way. He's not afraid of a fight. His campaign only launched a few weeks ago, but he's already using his platform to call for an end to the filibuster and stand with unionizing Amazon workers.
We need more leaders in Congress who are ready to take on big fights -- most of all the fight to break up corporate monopolies. Right now, tech giants are profiting off of toxic anti-democratic business models. Big Ag corporations are gobbling up family farmland across the Midwest. All because politicians enable a handful of companies to dominate our industries.
**Our communities pay the price of unchecked monopoly power.** Monopolies put small companies out of business, ship jobs overseas, and hollow out our communities. They're a huge reason why we now have an opioid crisis and rising deaths of despair among working people.
**Building a grassroots-funded movement to end monopoly domination of our economy is a huge undertaking. If anyone can do it, Lucas can.** [Can you chip in $5 or more today to help send Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate?](https://lucaskunce.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94b1071915c3a2a77d91a5fd9&id=0765bf10f1&e=4a867a2c4b)
Lucas gets the issues we're facing because he's faced them himself. His sister's heart surgeries led to his parents' bankruptcy. He struggled to afford a college education. He's watched his old neighborhood in Jeff City get crushed under the weight of massive corporations - the same thing has happened to so many of our communities nationwide.
Now he's running to bring a working people's agenda to the Senate. That means Lucas isn't just rejecting corporate PAC donations -- he's running to ABOLISH corporate PACs entirely. His campaign is relying on everyday folks like us to chip in what we can.
[Help support anti-monopoly advocate Lucas Kunce as he fights to take back an open U.S. Senate seat by chipping in $5 or more today.](https://lucaskunce.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94b1071915c3a2a77d91a5fd9&id=a2e0422e1a&e=4a867a2c4b)
Corporate monopoly power has destroyed family farms, increased the cost of health care, suppressed wages, made it impossible for small businesses to compete, and shipped countless jobs overseas. It's time to elect a Democrat from Missouri to the Senate who's ready to fight back.
In solidarity,
Zephyr Teachout
**[Donate](https://lucaskunce.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94b1071915c3a2a77d91a5fd9&id=8937bf2be0&e=4a867a2c4b)**
---
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://lucaskunce.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=94b1071915c3a2a77d91a5fd9&id=f5179fe43d&e=4a867a2c4b&c=6485165211). Mail us: PO BOX 1240, Independence, MO 64050.

body:

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: 🌱 Our first deadline is hours away 🌱
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aQxaOTMt9E4B0_59_gkSWolGWnZLxTUN_2An8mqI_sk=/ISkKzbXCOn4ycXpueq69tYf17OIOLLv1kIKCXymYeQQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210331-3-EM&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250)
---
| Peter,

In 2020, we won this election by fewer than two points. National Republican groups spent millions of dollars on ads attacking my campaign and me.

**Now, in the first quarter of 2021, they have already started running attack ads against me and phonebanking into our district, AND they have listed this seat as one of their top targets in 2022.**

In a few hours, we have a major fundraising deadline. We will close the books this critical first quarter of the year and the report will become public shortly thereafter. Here is why this is so critical:
* A strong grassroots fundraising quarter shows everyone that we have significant support across the district and beyond, and that we are ready to weather their attacks.
* Your grassroots support helps us pay for the critical elements of our campaign - a great team, literature for canvassers, digital ads, TV ads, and eventually an office where we will again bring our community of volunteers together!

clean_body: | | Peter, In 2020, we won this election by fewer than two points. National Republican groups spent millions of dollars on ads attacking my campaign and me. Now, in the first quarter of 2021, they have already started running attack ads against me and phonebanking into our district, AND they have listed this seat as one of their top targets in 2022. In a few hours, we have a major fundraising deadline. We will close the books this critical first quarter of the year and the report will become public shortly thereafter. Here is why this is so critical: A strong grassroots fundraising quarter shows everyone that we have significant support across the district and beyond, and that we are ready to weather their attacks. Your grassroots support helps us pay for the critical elements of our campaign - a great team, literature for canvassers, digital ads, TV ads, and eventually an office where we will again bring our community of volunteers together! Our grassroots support has always been a core part of our strategic advantage. | | | | | I am working hard in Congress to help improve people's lives, and with your support, that's what I will continue to do! subject: ATTN: We’re falling behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | Peter,
I wanted to send a quick personal message today to you today because as things stand right now, our fundraising efforts appear to be falling behind.
That's bad news for anyone who wants to see a swift end to the Biden Border Crisis, the Forever Wars overseas, or job-killing, globalist trade deals.
Help Us Get Back on Track Here: [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/email-falling-behind-q1](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hLDpVNU9EgsOZKQ-JaXSK9wj2KB7oHuXJxZOV8Bt3lknLmnNCvq9OcGRY4smBm9b3nOhnaFkaF5mEGhBRZJVqTa7jZ86MyNFYxRIzuZrBB2Bc7ZJQrgexWoYzCUheu3DyfV2KuVggRDmlixmM0uYyOoviCWrwkHJGhIxuynn6qMxhqNVbA7aMwIh5kdg76em&c=r3kBBsvHGCYb5SLVjrPMUrmI4IRy0BQ_6xv3X1a706_3rkkkPbgPfQ==&ch=t8BA29YWssGuUrp7BXdiIsfaGWuu07mZ39_j2hdt6tZeDN3RewZZrA==)
Our adversaries are lining their campaign coffers with the money of special interest PACs, and when they already had the mainstream media and Big Tech censorship overlords on their side, it's clear that we can't afford to be outpaced the way we are now.

Will you help my team's efforts to reach our quarterly fundraising goals by chipping in as little as $5 today?

-Matt Gaetz

| | Friend, I wanted to reach out and say thank you for your support in making our end of month push so successful. **With your support, we will be able to start organizing this month so we can hit the ground running as soon as the legislative session is over in May.** If you have not yet had the chance to make a donation, please consider making one today. Please remember: if you are a Minnesota resident, you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and receive a refund from the state.**It is a really great way to make a difference in your local elections at no cost to you.** [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/61lUsCK2i6Q2NBt87bjKGD8AFbojH4kdUT_IV-Gv_xk=/B8JgWCkJFGmCN2v3ynuDaX5h5X_1cJZWSKrxrHJMrA8=?refcode=033121EOM3) _ _ It is an honor to represent Minnesotans at the Capitol. We are determined to make sure that Minnesotans can thrive once the pandemic is behind us. I hope you're having a great week. Thank you for your support, Ryan Winkler Majority Leader Minnesota House of Representatives _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/61lUsCK2i6Q2NBt87bjKGD8AFbojH4kdUT_IV-Gv_xk=/B8JgWCkJFGmCN2v3ynuDaX5h5X_1cJZWSKrxrHJMrA8=?refcode=033121EOM3)

name: Lauren Hitt
subject: Not great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210331-1984-header&t=1&akid=1984%2E2526796%2EbQygfD)
Hey there,
I won't sugarcoat this: we're far behind where we need to be to reach our first quarter goal.
We set a goal of raising $3 million this quarter. I know the election is still a ways off, but what makes our movement strong is that **we don’t just organize around elections**.
We are organizing 365 days a year because we know that’s what’s required to take on special interests and win the progressive reforms we need — like raising the minimum wage, cancelling student debt, reimagining our immigration system, and more.
It’s why we host weekly Green New Deal phone banks, coordinate food relief efforts, and work to support progressive candidates like Nina Turner. It’s why Alexandria traveled to Texas to support relief efforts after the storm.
We don’t accept money from corporate PACs or special interests to help us grow this movement. It’s all folks just like you – chipping in $3, $10, or even $27 at a time. **We’re stronger because of it and we’re changing the politics in Washington.**
[**Our records show you’ve never made a donation. Will you make your first $3 donation today before midnight to help us reach this key goal?**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8494?refcode=em20210331-1984&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=1984%2E2526796%2EbQygfD)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8494?refcode=em20210331-1984&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1984%2E2526796%2EbQygfD)**
Thank you for helping us get this far,
Lauren Hitt
Communications Director
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210331-1984-footer&t=24&refcode2=1984_2526796_bQygfD&akid=1984%2E2526796%2EbQygfD)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). | Friends, We have some more great news for New Hampshire firearm owners -- this week the Senate Finance Committee voted to pass **SB 141, a bill to** **end NH's antiquated double background check system that has frustrated handgun purchasers with needlessly long waiting periods**. Currently, the state relies on the Department of Safety’s Gun Line to carry out the required National Instant Criminal Background Check (NICS) searches. Because the Gun Line has proven to be inefficient, even with recent changes, law abiding citizens have been forced to wait 6-10 months to exercise their Second Amendment rights, and that is simply unacceptable. [Read More About SB 141](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNjUzNzY2Mjk3MTY0NDUzMTE0JmM9cTlvNCZlPTE5MjgmYj01NjI3MzY2MTEmZD1mOGk0ZjVy.kG9wVjr3XAymnZHXITZAdMYDTSseprCYBumFsCT_ufE) The NH Senate Republicans understand how important the Second Amendment is and we are doing all we can to protect your Constitutional Rights -- but we need your help! [Will you consider making a small $15, $25 or even $100 contribution to our campaign fund](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNjUzNzY2Mjk3MTY0NDUzMTE0JmM9cTlvNCZlPTE5MjgmYj01NjI3MzY2MTcmZD1xMnMwcTZs.JQHwms9-0eEpmBxGDGnEhgY9mXTE-z12jQM5sI-LJdI), so that we can ensure that the Senate continues to be a friend to NH gun owners.? Thank you, The NH Senate Republicans

Hi there --
**FIRST:** Election experts called Maggie Hassan "the most vulnerable Senate Democrat up for reelection" in 2022.
**THEN:** Mitch McConnell's super PAC announced a MASSIVE seven-figure ad campaign in New Hampshire and other targeted Senate races.
**NOW:** Our first FEC deadline of the year is just hours away. This is a massive test of how vulnerable our campaign is -- and if we fall short, it'll invite even more right-wing attacks.
Republicans only need to flip one seat to take control of the Senate, and they've made Maggie their number one target. [**With just hours to go until our end-of-quarter deadline, can you rush a contribution of $3 or more today?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8bc/2a380d31/26c833dd/f07a3e/2687905653/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMV9lb3EzX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210331_eoq3_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: my final ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
I’m over the moon, and coming back to my best supporters one last time to see if you can help.

I only need 1 more gift from 18326 before midnight to hit my End of Month goal!

If we can blow our End of Quarter goal out of the water, we'll hand Trump a HISTORIC and HUMILIATING defeat.

Can I count on you to be the one grassroots donor I need from 18326?

I’ve just increased my match and I'm personally 4X-MATCHING all gifts until midnight!

$5 = $25! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210331_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30_rs&amount=5]
$15 = $75! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210331_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15]
$25 = $125! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210331_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30_rs&amount=25]
$100 = $500! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210331_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30_rs&amount=100]
Chip in another amount now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210331_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30_rs&amount=25]

Thank you,

Nancy
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.

We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.

Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25]

SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]

Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a2cbcf1f-b091-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992/992ebcad-8792-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTJlYmNhZC04NzkyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b61qbdBNp3S38adMuUVZMSrAlrotjlp9q6cnaw7c5Yk=&id=117907000 .
