name: Giffords.org
subject: Midnight Deadline
body:
#

Friends,
Our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2021 comes to an end in just a few hours and we need your last minute support to hit our 25,000 contribution goal.
So we'll keep this short.
This is your last chance to make a contribution towards our FEC fundraising goal before our deadline at midnight.
We're so close to achieving this goal. And every dollar we raise will go towards our efforts to urge the Senate to pass background checks immediately and save lives. Because when lives are at stake, we can't afford to wait.
**So before time runs out, we have to ask:**
[**Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC before midnight? We 'll take that contribution and put it right to work passing the lifesaving bipartisan background checks bill that will be voted on in the Senate.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee169/78fba3aa/62bfc6d1/50aad997/3789070761/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210331-2-full")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee169/78fba3aa/62bfc6d1/50aad868/3789070761/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210331-2-full") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee169/78fba3aa/62bfc6d1/50aad86b/3789070761/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210331-2-full")
---|---
[Donate $50](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee169/78fba3aa/62bfc6d1/50aad86a/3789070761/VEsHAw/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210331-2-full") | [Donate $100](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee169/78fba3aa/62bfc6d1/50aad86d/3789070761/VEsHAg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210331-2-full")
---|---
[Donate $250](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee169/78fba3aa/62bfc6d1/50aad86c/3789070761/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210331-2-full") | [Other amount](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee169/78fba3aa/62bfc6d1/50aad869/3789070761/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210331-2-full")
---|---
Regardless of what you're able to give, any amount will make a big difference in our ability to organize successfully around this bill.
And just know that we wouldn't have made it this far without you, so thank you so much for all that you've done and continue to do to support our efforts.
We'll be in touch as we learn more, and you'll be the first to know when this background checks legislation makes progress in the Senate.
Thank you and stay tuned,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee169/78fba3aa/62bfc6d1/50aad997/3789070761/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210331-2-full")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee169/78fba3aa/62bfc6d1/50aad86f/3789070761/VEsEBA/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.
clean_body: Friends, Our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2021 comes to an end in just a few hours and we need your last minute support to hit our 25,000 contribution goal. So we'll keep this short. This is your last chance to make a contribution towards our FEC fundraising goal before our deadline at midnight. We're so close to achieving this goal. And every dollar we raise will go towards our efforts to urge the Senate to pass background checks immediately and save lives. Because when lives are at stake, we can't afford to wait. So before time runs out, we have to ask: "" If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" ---|--- Regardless of what you're able to give, any amount will make a big difference in our ability to organize successfully around this bill. And just know that we wouldn't have made it this far without you, so thank you so much for all that you've done and continue to do to support our efforts. We'll be in touch as we learn more, and you'll be the first to know when this background checks legislation makes progress in the Senate. Thank you and stay tuned, Team Giffords "" *

name: Rand Paul
subject: Help me defeat socialism in the classroom
body:
I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1d43880c0e7e446f95cdb2c81c63d0c1&_e=_ONjGQPbnUnTstmIK9Tt99maO4vfeiYw74p0lnZKZiCh3IcXP_xGoBZVmvQiKNccuxXydbso3Bj6OoutvbyKzOQUvVmifI3xoDGEFBQV8H2jTIBY9636E2O11flZiY8l81o5DeUxU7Cp0eYQAH_9vP7QEeJTobVXD9YHVTC-SqIJz-3eg8QIPirFLz1bCKGgUaHeNziphfu-J9aU71s2AynWPosSF72kVm5Vw_qyuNrVZsmxOYHa7zndBTRkSfv403h2-8lLQTWmgtBGq4WfgvSVxfACGfijd7UIiTdOp3P2nO23KZxWOQJAJkjdeIG2)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I’ve learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched “FEE In the Classroom.”

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : “ _why haven’t I heard these ideas before_?”

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America’s public schools don’t teach our nation’s founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1d43880c0e7e446f95cdb2c81c63d0c1&_e=_ONjGQPbnUnTstmIK9Tt99maO4vfeiYw74p0lnZKZiCh3IcXP_xGoBZVmvQiKNccuxXydbso3Bj6OoutvbyKzOQUvVmifI3xoDGEFBQV8H3dqPjpw-wcbdDQ6A7412VjEoqKG8IhFidoAY8VJjVhU9jSfUkBm2i_uUTeCp5_E3DptVuv6ZkTcO1dbaAKTJ5F3J5d1jmvy3k5w7RY375BP_3Mv_cOqb47uNTn-JlJB3OEbhfnys11Pe4-fkePZxe4ISOCKpDT4hNSWtsdnEGrcfhwN5XKTvcOZcL6RCbVY_0pJeg7sRAeKCUT5TpvAbLu)

[**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom! **](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1d43880c0e7e446f95cdb2c81c63d0c1&_e=_ONjGQPbnUnTstmIK9Tt99maO4vfeiYw74p0lnZKZiCh3IcXP_xGoBZVmvQiKNccuxXydbso3Bj6OoutvbyKzOQUvVmifI3xoDGEFBQV8H3G30gIPIqO_AYK9oPlF_zYqE0GbJUBe8ObPwY1jy079SYQGaQdnC9_mhA4N6ujS2NCO_NRjuaPPb3AjFd24dCEJ94wVSWYM54YTiUEKSze7OVQCJ38K5RccoviFJdujTJFDaRge-MwajWVeWp4xTrQeTooHk8rxeQgswNXx7NpxaK0tSw3jm4YvBMQ2mGSXk-jPTjm4waanTAELVzq4OwV)
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1d43880c0e7e446f95cdb2c81c63d0c1&_e=_ONjGQPbnUnTstmIK9Tt99maO4vfeiYw74p0lnZKZiCh3IcXP_xGoBZVmvQiKNccuxXydbso3Bj6OoutvbyKzOQUvVmifI3xoDGEFBQV8H3OoV_o7WSI-llQ5Ui9rbivm8VtiG-xiA1uMTB4idEeYo75ZUSVhhmas_nZOxh3iqPiPftEW0T0c-2ftnKMDXruwR3QwiFa2G1nf_5Rqs1Mz9a2dspvSgI9pcl0ZnlJgsofdt2EisYIx2Wsm88U8FkiQl77FZySU16X1p5GXrFmICyVGfSO1yRW1k1o-KCFoI6eZkL6kKBu5lUHYWxt6abO)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE’s efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It’s no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation’s youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE’s President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union’s Communist rule in Lithuania. He’s now made it his life’s mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>> **](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1d43880c0e7e446f95cdb2c81c63d0c1&_e=_ONjGQPbnUnTstmIK9Tt99maO4vfeiYw74p0lnZKZiCh3IcXP_xGoBZVmvQiKNccuxXydbso3Bj6OoutvbyKzOQUvVmifI3xoDGEFBQV8H1u4U1YdTSGBx0FOgDDgxi36iVfNlSRmT4jng3azPUrzUNkGD2dsChfpoFjkM-eyzYydU48guvFJ6IOffK1KNu3TcSBGsdGJz5Fc_YBApB5Vk5OpDpMlZik0m-slk373kp4Yyu9IDnUC5BQV8ZZflscVbo4zehyMltA5hb1j-vIrJPBVmDh9T-zGzyNrtwl3Hf726trlOQTlD1F_FxxxO0P)

Friend, I’m sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[**Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1d43880c0e7e446f95cdb2c81c63d0c1&_e=_ONjGQPbnUnTstmIK9Tt99maO4vfeiYw74p0lnZKZiCh3IcXP_xGoBZVmvQiKNccuxXydbso3Bj6OoutvbyKzOQUvVmifI3xoDGEFBQV8H0VoT4uD9Do8pcP80U8c5fcNdkjQNif2uBmntSw8FCXIXnVtp_zQ6xfaxom_Kdv5ZG6jyqnZ61Eo7g48k9irYheTK6UJi0py6HPxmaKwhmAlnsccdUChWx3E3gYb2eXixCWyWJ_o_7ePP3OwJAr_tO7MuwzKhqB2I6VqhtCUyZr3x_fw_EOp9aScCTw7DJB4lXoMoBkJYyK2sl1QF4_BX6j)

I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE’s newest supporters.

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

[**unsubscribe**](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=1d43880c0e7e446f95cdb2c81c63d0c1&_t=ax_kmOZ6YcjTX4c_MVRT8ViLCoY_BnWY7p3R0ATYS1iYKTMeZ0pchED_rdoaS2A-_tdgA_4p7TgJw4FkWaZenMoot5ArrDKndPHVyfFEryTtj75Idk-UsAaRFI6XoHUNdKFFeCrym43pekvrwuqp_InwfsbQKGKt4dK_9dyNsRs%3D)

To: Peter
From: Team Kasich
Date: March 30, 2021

We wanted to share two quick updates with you:

Gov. John Kasich recently spoke about how President Biden needs to try harder if he hopes to keep his promise about working to find bipartisan solutions to our nation's challenges. Passing a $1.9 trillion spending bill without a single Republican vote isn't a promising start.

And yes, there is blame to go around on both sides but getting this done requires stronger leadership. It is achievable and critical for our nation's health. [Watch the clip here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=b864c9e39caa4a2d9b738120a731a948&_e=h_BrYXeLcA2_8K_VLLKg-9jYPdvIeaVb9P2KQ_PzCzNK8EaNoPoxviqwJnlVzS7nrFfCTAl6uBWgmAcYU_q5gjm6RWz2Gyd2dncZQjgsjs06ybe-JItZQvlyRClfyVAfU6KWlXtpyMdVvlbUSDduibxJXsqC_7oWR229hSXnyrRo_nIZU9XzcO07sOHJGK9TXB288Kfe2BfSrb7DO1osFFgchxHnfFA5u3hXOafpCjO80JiYfJnLnFbhaos6O0A6M5Feg7zGlXeRHPZEF2RMqy_alN3C81TgBejF10KRFmfWNZawTKqEuqrtNLz24qy1) and please consider sharing it.

**Support this message:**

We have a critical March fundraising deadline and could use your help.

Gov. Kasich will continue to advocate for fiscal responsibility and be a leading voice on conservative issues. At the same time, he will continue to call upon the Republican Party to rediscover its passion for big ideas and creative solutions to America’s greatest challenges. Without this, the party has now lost the White House and both chambers of Congress.

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: A better tomorrow in California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
I’m looking for 22 Californians to step up to the plate. Read more >>
Peter, I want to personally thank every single supporter who has chipped in to my campaign for California governor. For too long, Californians have been suffering under failed leadership in our great state. The one-party Democratic rule we’ve had in Sacramento for over a decade now has devastated the middle class, and destroyed dreams. It’s time for a California Comeback, and I’m ready to lead it! We have a critical deadline TONIGHT at midnight and I’m asking my top supporters to chip in and help us reach our goal of raising $20,000. We only need 22 supporters to donate now and we can start out April on strong footing to beat Gavin Newsom this fall. Will you please send your best gift right now? If you’ve donated in the past, all your information should be saved already, making it easier than ever to chip in: **[https://secure.anedot.com/faulconer-for-governor/march](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/601ee6fa5ebaebb0/1dad8abc70fb5479c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** As your next governor, I’ll be the leader who says, “We want jobs in our state,” instead of showing businesses the door like our current leadership has done. Let's boost up the middle class, and everyone who aspires to get there — without raising taxes. There’s a better tomorrow coming in California, but we all need to work together to achieve it. Thanks for your help,
Kevin Faulconer | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/601ee6fa5ebaebb0/348b0590bba4020dc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/601ee6fa5ebaebb0/9212805cc97e33edc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/601ee6fa5ebaebb0/67af55976b9f4415c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

body:

| | Friend,

Did you see Congressman Feenstra's email?

**His critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is in just 6 hours.**

[Please, consider donating today to help the Congressman hit his goal](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5937659d71&e=d48ad6f8f4)[. Anything you can contribute will help!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=80f3631de0&e=d48ad6f8f4)

Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are waiting for Randy to fail to hit his first fundraising goal and we need your help to make sure he proves them wrong!

\- Team Feenstra

From: **Randy Feenstra**
Date: Wed, Mar 31, 2021
Subject: Our First Critical Deadline

| | Friend,
My campaign is facing a critical deadline. Midnight tonight is end of our first fundraising quarter of the 2022 campaign.

I have spent this first quarter delivering on the promises I made on the campaign trail. Together, we earned Iowa a crucial spot on the House Agriculture Committee, we advocated for Derecho relief for Iowa farmers, stood up against reckless liberal spending and fought for safe immigration laws.

I'm prepared to continue delivering on the promises I made, but I need you help. [Can I count on you to chip in $5, $15 or $25 to help me hit my first quarter fundraising goal?](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=bdb406a807&e=d48ad6f8f4)

---
| Our work is just getting started and I know that we need the voices of Iowa's Fourth District to be heard in Washington.

You've done so much for my campaign, please consider contributing today to help me finish this first fundraising quarter strong!
---
| \- Randy Feenstra

P.S. I know you are getting a lot of requests this week, but [please contribute just $5, $10, $15 or whatever you can to help my team hit our critical deadline before midnight tonight!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=1e1a155ce5&e=d48ad6f8f4)

name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: Katie Porter needs your help tonight
body:
The National Republican Congressional Committee announced their 2022 targets. Katie Porter is on that list. Hi Peter, Katie Porter flipped a long time Republican district in Orange county, California in 2018, becoming the first Democrat to hold office there. She has been fighting for our progressive values ever since, and Republicans have been fighting her since day one. [**No****surprise**** that last month, when the National Republican Congressional Committee announced there 2022 targets, Katie's name was on that list.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27035796/278852263/1834377524?refcode=q1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiNWQ4NzU3LTk2OTItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wAhbX9RUV-hmOWv_ib1CJnGyxEtMRWDlwFdEaiTxbb4=) The GOP is already raising massive amounts of money to take this seat back and we simply can't wait to act until 2022. [**Peter, Katie needs your help before our fundraising deadline tonight at midnight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27035797/278852264/1834377524?refcode=q1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiNWQ4NzU3LTk2OTItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wAhbX9RUV-hmOWv_ib1CJnGyxEtMRWDlwFdEaiTxbb4=) Katie's district has a Republican voter registration advantage and our House majority could not be more vulnerable.**[We are going to keep this short--we need you to chip in what you can before midnight tonight to help Katie. If you are able to split a donation, it will make all the difference for us.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27035798/278852265/1834377524?refcode=q1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiNWQ4NzU3LTk2OTItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wAhbX9RUV-hmOWv_ib1CJnGyxEtMRWDlwFdEaiTxbb4=)** We are grateful for your support, especially at moments like this. -Moms for Katie Porter [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27035799/278852266/1834377524?refcode=q1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiNWQ4NzU3LTk2OTItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wAhbX9RUV-hmOWv_ib1CJnGyxEtMRWDlwFdEaiTxbb4=) Moms in Office
